feature_intent: The application uses JWT-based authentication with security best practices, including password hashing, account lockout, rate limiting, and XSS protection. It supports three user roles: Super Admin, Merchant, and Customer, each with different capabilities and access levels.

risk_areas.spec_source: The application uses JWT-based authentication with security best practices.
Rate limiting to prevent brute-force attacks

ambiguous_requirements.description: The specification does not clearly define the exact behavior for account lockout after 3 failed login attempts.
ambiguous_requirements.spec_source: Account lockout after 3 failed login attempts (5 minute lock)

ambiguous_requirements.description: The specification does not provide details on the exact implementation of role-based access control.
ambiguous_requirements.spec_source: The system enforces role permissions using backend middleware.

flagged: Lack of details on role-based access control implementation
